instructor.title: My Courses
instructor.description: Manage, organize, and monitor created courses with quick edit and duplication features.

instructor.title: Add / Edit Courses
instructor.description: Upload video, documents, quizzes, and interactive assignments with built-in plagiarism checks.

instructor.title: View Student Progress
instructor.description: Access individual and batch performance summaries with filtering options.

instructor.title: Analytics
instructor.description: Track course completions, enrollments, ratings, watch time, and student engagement heatmaps.

instructor.title: Manage Tests & Assignments
instructor.description: Create, schedule, auto-grade quizzes, and provide manual grading with feedback.

instructor.title: Company Project Integration
instructor.description: Assign, track, and evaluate live industry projects with submission status.

instructor.title: Mock Interview Conduction
instructor.description: Schedule, host, and assess mock interviews with recorded session playback.

instructor.title: Progress Report Generation
instructor.description: Automated, customizable reports for individual students or groups.

instructor.title: Live Class Scheduling
instructor.description: Host interactive sessions with polls, whiteboards, breakout rooms, and auto-recording.

instructor.title: Student Feedback & Ratings
instructor.description: View feedback analytics, sentiment breakdown, and improvement suggestions.

instructor.title: Revenue & Earnings Tracking
instructor.description: Monitor income, payout schedules, conversion rates, and sales funnels.

instructor.title: Collaboration Tools
instructor.description: Co-create courses with other instructors, share teaching resources, and split revenues.

instructor.title: Assignment & Test Analytics
instructor.description: See difficulty ratings, average scores, and question-level performance.

instructor.title: Marketing Tools
instructor.description: Email campaigns, coupon creation, and social media sharing for course promotion.

instructor.title: AI Content Suggestions
instructor.description: Get automated recommendations for new topics or course improvements.

instructor.title: Community Engagement
instructor.description: Host instructor blogs, AMA (Ask Me Anything) sessions, and discussion groups.
